# Auto-Generated Narrative Skill

Generated: 2026-03-15T16:21:20.633Z

## Trigger
Segment combines artifact discovery with environmental symbolism to reveal a plot twist.

## Guidelines
- Use tangible historical artifacts to deliver expository backstory naturally without dialogue.
- Synchronize environmental changes (weather, plants, temperature) with the emotional weight of the revelation.
- Frame the revealed truth as a moral or causal link between past and present characters.

## Examples
- Finding a bloodstained ledger during a thunderstorm that exposes a generations-old family betrayal.
- A frozen room suddenly warming when the protagonist reads a letter forgiving an ancestral sin.
